plist.dict:
CFBundleDisplayName ByteAI CFBundleIconName AppIcon CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundleName $(PRODUCT_NAME) CFBundlePackageType APPL CFBundleShortVersionString 1.0 CFBundleVersion 1 LSRequiresIPhoneOS
UIApplicationSceneManifest
UIApplicationSupportsMultipleScenes
UIApplicationShortcutItems
UIApplicationShortcutItemType com.byteai.shortcut.support UIApplicationShortcutItemTitle Open Support UIApplicationShortcutItemSubtitle Talk to the team UIApplicationShortcutItemIconType UIApplicationShortcutIconTypeMessage
UIApplicationShortcutItemType com.byteai.shortcut.chat UIApplicationShortcutItemTitle Open Chat UIApplicationShortcutItemSubtitle Jump to your inbox UIApplicationShortcutItemIconType UIApplicationShortcutIconTypeCompose
UIApplicationShortcutItemType com.byteai.shortcut.shortcuts UIApplicationShortcutItemTitle Hidden Features UIApplicationShortcutItemSubtitle Every gesture & shortcut UIApplicationShortcutItemIconType UIApplicationShortcutIconTypeBookmark
SupabaseURL $(SUPABASE_URL) SupabaseAnonKey $(SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)
ByteAIApiURL $(BYTEAI_API_URL)
ByteAIShareBaseURL $(BYTEAI_SHARE_BASE_URL) #ifdef BYTEAI_DEBUG
NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription ByteAI uses your local network during development to reach a local backend. NSBonjourServices
_http._tcp
#endif
NSFaceIDUsageDescription ByteAI uses Face ID to securely sign you in.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription ByteAI needs access to your photo library so you can choose a profile picture.
NSPasteboardUsageDescription ByteAI uses the clipboard so you can paste content into your posts. #ifdef BYTEAI_DEBUG
NSAppTransportSecurity
NSAllowsLocalNetworking
NSAllowsArbitraryLoads
#endif
GIDClientID $(GOOGLE_IOS_CLIENT_ID) GIDServerClientID $(GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID)
CFBundleURLTypes
CFBundleURLSchemes
byteai
CFBundleURLName com.byteai.auth
CFBundleURLName com.byteai.googlesignin CFBundleURLSchemes
$(GOOGLE_IOS_REVERSED_CLIENT_ID)
UIBackgroundModes
remote-notification
UILaunchScreen
UIColorName LaunchBackground UIImageName LaunchLogo UIImageRespectsSafeAreaInsets
UIRequiredDeviceCapabilities
arm64
UISupportedInterfaceOrientations
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait
